sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n106415" key="u(droku/wn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑδρο-κύων</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[κῠ]</pron><foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">, κύνος, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>,</foreign> title of Menippean Satire by Varro, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Gell.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">13.31.2</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
